productionEpochPolicy.closeRule: An epoch closes only after all creation targets and its bounded refinement-and-pruning slice pass validation and publication.

legacyPlayableUpgrades.note: Legacy playable upgrades remain excluded from new-production creation counts.

lastCatalogUnit.result: Accepted 10 genuinely new natural-language kit contracts after six additional duplicate, catalog-overlap, or blurred-scope rejections; no implementation was created.

lastCreationUnit.result: Upgraded Next Ledge so original anchor-12 returns 134 SPEED through a longer mint restore pulse or 175 CARGO through a shorter amber drive and physically points both branches into original anchor-13 using the existing restored event, recovery/aim, tether, target, camera, HUD, effects, and synth owners; production creation counts remain unchanged.

lastRefinementUnit.result: A surviving Emberplate wall through Siege 2 now unlocks one readable 5 crystal plus 3 energy specialist recipe; the existing build action deploys exactly one core-side Sentry, and wall-less failure restores the starter-wall recovery action.

lastCompletedUnit.scope: Next Ledge anchor-12 branch-aware restore pulse into original anchor-13
lastCompletedUnit.result: Original anchor-12 now acknowledges 134 SPEED with a 36-frame mint lift or 175 CARGO with a 26-frame amber drive, then routes both branches through the existing assist and cable owners into a physical one-shot anchor-13 catch.
lastCompletedUnit.validation: All 28 existing Next Ledge test entrypoints, affected JavaScript syntax, production JSON parsing, and diff hygiene passed. Playwright completed both full routes through branch-aware restore pulses and anchor-13 latches, proved failure and physical keyboard recovery, checked Advanced closed/open/closed, replayed the full safe route after cleanup, and reported zero console messages. Human View passed the first screen plus mint and amber restore frames with diagnostics closed. Matched detached starting-code performance improved 204.686 to 193.957 ms average frame time, 4.886 to 5.156 FPS, and 304.3 to 284.3 ms p95; 69 DOM nodes, one canvas, 76 descriptors, 236 scene nodes, bounded line capacities, and non-monotonic heap checkpoints remained bounded.
lastCompletedUnit.publication: Experiments production commit aacb20ccc1423d0062814c1b5979c68d76002d75 published to resolved default branch main after fetch-before-push verification; this repository commit records the publication receipt. ProtoKits remained unchanged and synchronized at 194d37714d7c23984970e09015b5dd4bffbbab7b.

exactNextUnit.goal: Make original anchor-13 close both branch results through one cyan stabilization catch and point toward original anchor-14, reusing the existing anchor-locked event, route-choice score, route progress, tether, camera, HUD, spark, and synth owners without another state or control.
